entities.girl: a teenage girl holding an opened letter

scenes.title: The Letter
scenes.background_prompt: A teenager's bedroom with a desk by the window, a bulletin board with photos, fairy lights, and a bookshelf. Afternoon light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A teenager's bedroom in warm afternoon light. A girl of about fifteen with wavy auburn hair sits at a wooden desk by the window, holding an opened letter in both hands. She has clearly just finished reading it — the envelope lies torn open on the desk. Her expression is complex and contemplative: lips slightly parted, eyes unfocused as if looking through the letter rather than at it, processing what she just read. Is it good news or bad? Her face gives no clear answer. Papers and notebooks are scattered across the desk. A bulletin board above the desk is covered in photos of friends, concert tickets, and sticky notes. Fairy lights in warm white are strung along the board's edge. A mug of tea sits untouched on the desk, a tea bag string draped over the rim.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl at the desk by the window, sitting and holding an opened letter in both hands, lips slightly parted, eyes unfocused as if processing. Torn envelope on the desk.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground, dark brown wooden floorboards run horizontally across the bottom of the scene, partially covered by a colorful striped rug with red, blue, green, and yellow bands and dark tassels. On the left side of the room, a rectangular corkboard with a wooden frame is mounted on a light green wall. The corkboard is decorated with several small square photographs, a postcard, a yellow sticky note, and a drawing of a tree, all held in place by colorful pushpins. A string of glowing yellow fairy lights is draped around the top and sides of the corkboard. In the center of the room, a wooden desk sits against the wall. On the left side of the desk, there is a stack of three books: a thick brown book on the bottom, a blue book in the middle, and a thinner brown book on top. Behind the books, a dark grey laptop is partially visible. To the right of the laptop sits a white mug and a small terracotta pot containing a green succulent plant. An open white envelope lies on the desk next to the plant. A young girl with light skin and brown hair tied in a high ponytail sits on a small wooden chair at the desk. She is wearing a green long-sleeved shirt under yellow corduroy overalls and brown lace-up boots. She holds a white rectangular piece of paper with both hands, looking at it with a wide-eyed, surprised expression. Behind the desk is a large white-framed window with a string of yellow fairy lights draped across the top curtain rod. Through the window, a bright outdoor scene is visible under a light blue sky with fluffy white clouds, featuring lush green trees, a grassy meadow with small pink and yellow flowers, and a distant wooden fence. On the right side of the room, a tall five-shelf wooden bookshelf stands against the green wall. The shelves are filled with many colorful books in shades of red, blue, green, yellow, and brown. On the middle shelf, there is a small framed picture and a light brown storage box. On the very top of the bookshelf sit two storage boxes: a smaller light green one on the left and a larger brown one on the right.
